testcase.name: registeredUserLogin

error.message:
element click intercepted: Element is not clickable at point (1319, 34). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=134.0.6998.179) Build info: version: '4.29.0', revision: '5fc1ec94cb' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '23' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [c35d3de57fbbbe8141bdbe4a7ad8d6ac, clickElement {id=f.51A7299F1E26B2FAFC3831A83EC8EAB0.d.031572000144558F05E8C31717E2E2D2.e.113}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 134.0.6998.179, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 134.0.6998.165 (fd886e2cb29..., userDataDir: C:\Users\Gursewak\AppData\L...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:59734}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:59734/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 134.0.6998.179, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (c35d3de57fbbbe8141bdbe4a7ad8d6ac)] -> xpath: //i[@class='mdi mdi-chevron-down d-none d-xl-inline-block']] Session ID: c35d3de57fbbbe8141bdbe4a7ad8d6ac
